rationale: Tests if localized options open-interest concentrations function as institutional support during market drawdowns.
expected_failure_mode: Gamma walls can break or shift lower as market makers dynamically hedge.
stop_conditions: quick grid has no candidate worth full certification
overlay worsens drawdown or live-era share multiple
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
More than 25% of gamma-wall entries experience immediate breakthroughs exceeding 5%.
Underperforms a simple 200-day moving-average filter over the long era.
